title: Parichay Authenticator
heading_chain: Stepwise Guide to enable tap/token authentication on Parichay Authenticator
heading: Parichay Authenticator
sub_section: Stepwise Guide to enable tap/token authentication on Parichay Authenticator
text:
## Stepwise Guide to enable tap/token authentication on Parichay Authenticator

[Click Here] to Download the User Manual

* **Step 1:** Go to parichay.nic.in
* **Step 2:** Enter your username and password in the required fields and click on the “Next” button.
* **Step 3:** Select either “OTP on Mobile” or “Backup Code” and click on the “Next” button to proceed.
* **Step 4:** Enter the “OTP” in the required field and click on “Next” button to complete the two-step verification process.
* **Step 5:** Click on the top-right “button” to see the “Settings” option.
* **Step 6:** Click on the “Settings” option to proceed.
* **Step 7:** Click on the “OFF” button to turn ‘’ON’’ the Multi-factor Authentication in Account Settings tab.
* **Step 8:** Now, you have to scan the QR using the Scanner of Parichay Authenticator app on your mobile.
* **Step 9:** Open the Parichay Authenticator app on your smartphone. Click on the “Skip” button to proceed.
* **Step 10:** Choose any one of the “Screen lock type”
* **Step 11:** Click on the “Scan QR Code” Button.
* **Step 12:** Scan the QR using your smartphone camera.

Now, you will be able to see the token, use this to configure your account.

* **Step 13:** Enter the six-digit token number in the required field below the QR Code.

Now, you have successfully configured your account with Parichay Authenticator for multi-factor authentication.
content:
## Stepwise Guide to enable tap/token authentication on Parichay Authenticator

[Click Here] to Download the User Manual

* **Step 1:** Go to parichay.nic.in
* **Step 2:** Enter your username and password in the required fields and click on the “Next” button.
* **Step 3:** Select either “OTP on Mobile” or “Backup Code” and click on the “Next” button to proceed.
* **Step 4:** Enter the “OTP” in the required field and click on “Next” button to complete the two-step verification process.
* **Step 5:** Click on the top-right “button” to see the “Settings” option.
* **Step 6:** Click on the “Settings” option to proceed.
* **Step 7:** Click on the “OFF” button to turn ‘’ON’’ the Multi-factor Authentication in Account Settings tab.
* **Step 8:** Now, you have to scan the QR using the Scanner of Parichay Authenticator app on your mobile.
* **Step 9:** Open the Parichay Authenticator app on your smartphone. Click on the “Skip” button to proceed.
* **Step 10:** Choose any one of the “Screen lock type”
* **Step 11:** Click on the “Scan QR Code” Button.
* **Step 12:** Scan the QR using your smartphone camera.

Now, you will be able to see the token, use this to configure your account.

* **Step 13:** Enter the six-digit token number in the required field below the QR Code.

Now, you have successfully configured your account with Parichay Authenticator for multi-factor authentication.
